milestones.title: Phase 1: Hub & Profiles
milestones.description: Roblox place, hub world, DataStore profiles, bey select UI, remotes scaffolding.

milestones.title: Phase 2: Core Battle
milestones.description: Arena physics, graphics, animations, battle HUD, and win rules — playable 1v1 without abilities.

milestones.title: Phase 3: Abilities & Assets
milestones.description: Import BeyWeb models/logos, ability registry, all 10 special moves with VFX.

milestones.title: Phase 4: PvP & Networking
milestones.description: Authoritative match sync, ranked queue, ELO, leaderboards.

milestones.title: Phase 5: Campaign & AI
milestones.description: Campaign stages, AI tiers, casual mode, CPU difficulty.

milestones.title: Phase 6: Meta & Shop
milestones.description: XP, coins, gacha rolls, Robux products, progression unlocks.

milestones.title: Phase 7: Tournaments
milestones.description: Bracket events, entry gates, scheduled UI, placement rewards.

milestones.title: Phase 8: 2v2 Team Modes
milestones.description: Party queue, team spawns, team ELO, tag-team battles.

milestones.title: Phase 9: Parts & Customization
milestones.description: Part catalog, bey builder, stat recompute, color variants, drops.

milestones.title: Phase 10: Polish & QA
milestones.description: Audio, camera polish, mobile UX, anti-cheat, tests, load testing, seasonal badges.

issues.title: Create Roblox Hub place and Rojo sync
issues.body:
## Summary
Set up the primary Hub place in Roblox Studio and wire Rojo so `src/` syncs into the DataModel on play.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Hub place file exists and opens in Studio
- [ ] `default.project.json` maps all `src/` folders
- [ ] Rojo serve + Studio connect works without errors
- [ ] StarterPlayer and ServerScriptService scripts run on join

## BeyWeb reference
- `default.project.json`
- `aftman.toml` / `wally.toml`
- `src/` tree

## BeyBlox target paths
- `default.project.json`
- `src/ServerScriptService/init.server.lua`
- `src/StarterPlayer/StarterPlayerScripts/init.client.lua`

issues.title: Hub spawn area and mode portals
issues.body:
## Summary
Build the hub spawn plaza with teleporter portals for Ranked, Casual, Campaign, Shop, and Tournaments.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] SpawnLocation with safe bounds
- [ ] Portal parts or ProximityPrompts for each game mode
- [ ] Client UI labels each portal
- [ ] Server validates teleport requests

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/ui/playSetup.js` (mode select flow)
- `js/ui/onlineLobby.js`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/Workspace/Hub/` (Studio)
- `src/ReplicatedStorage/Shared/GameModes.lua`
- Hub ScreenGui in `src/StarterGui/`

issues.title: ProfileService DataStore with session lock
issues.body:
## Summary
Persist player profiles (owned beys, coins, XP, settings) using ProfileService with session locking.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Profile template loads on PlayerAdded
- [ ] Session lock prevents duplicate servers
- [ ] Auto-save on interval and PlayerRemoving
- [ ] Reconcile defaults for new fields

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/game/state.js` (local state shape)
- `docs/PROGRESSION_ECONOMY.md`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/ServerScriptService/ProfileService.lua`
- `src/ReplicatedStorage/Shared/Progression.lua`
- DataStore: `PlayerProfiles_v1`

issues.title: Bey select carousel UI
issues.body:
## Summary
Port BeyWeb bey selection carousel to a hub ScreenGui with previews for owned beys.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Carousel scrolls through owned beys
- [ ] Selected bey saved to profile
- [ ] Shows bey name, type, and stats summary
- [ ] Works on PC and mobile

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/ui/selection.js`
- `js/game/beys.js`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/StarterGui/BeySelect/`
- `src/ReplicatedStorage/Shared/BeyCatalog.lua`
- `reference/beys.json`

issues.title: Basic inventory display UI
issues.body:
## Summary
Show owned beys, parts placeholder, coins, and XP in a hub inventory panel.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Inventory opens from hub button
- [ ] Lists owned beys from profile
- [ ] Displays coin and XP totals
- [ ] Read-only until shop phase

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/ui/domRefs.js`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/StarterGui/Inventory/`
- Remote: `Remotes/ProfileSync`

issues.title: ReplicatedStorage remotes scaffolding
issues.body:
## Summary
Create RemoteEvents/RemoteFunctions folder and document contracts for profile, match, and shop.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Remotes folder under ReplicatedStorage
- [ ] MatchInput, MatchSnapshot, ProfileSync stubs exist
- [ ] README documents payload shapes
- [ ] Server binds handlers without errors

## BeyWeb reference

- `js/net/remoteInput.js`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/ReplicatedStorage/Remotes/`
- `src/ReplicatedStorage/Remotes/README.md`

issues.title: Shared Config module from BeyWeb constants
issues.body:
## Summary
Port `js/config.js` tuning values into a Luau Config module used by physics and rules.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Gravity, spin decay, arena radius constants match BeyWeb
- [ ] Launch grace and clash tuning exported
- [ ] Single source imported by server physics
- [ ] Values documented against `reference/config.json`

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/config.js`
- `reference/config.json`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/ReplicatedStorage/Shared/Config.lua`
- `reference/config.json`

issues.title: Bey body spawn and collider setup
issues.body:
## Summary
Spawn bey MeshParts in arena with correct scale, mass, and cylindrical collider for manual clash math.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Bey spawns at launch points with correct height
- [ ] Collider radius matches BeyWeb `top.js`
- [ ] Default Roblox elasticity disabled
- [ ] Body state table tracks position, velocity, spin

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/physics/top.js`
- `js/game/matchFactory.js`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/ServerScriptService/Physics/BeyBody.lua`
- `src/ServerScriptService/MatchService.lua`

issues.title: Spin gauge decay over time
issues.body:
## Summary
Implement 0–1 spin gauge drain matching BeyWeb stamina curves.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Spin decreases per tick at CONFIG rate
- [ ] Low spin triggers wobble threshold
- [ ] Spin reaches zero → sleep-out eligible
- [ ] Spin synced in MatchSnapshot

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/physics/top.js` (spin decay)
- `js/config.js`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/ServerScriptService/Physics/Spin.lua`
- `src/ReplicatedStorage/Shared/Config.lua`

issues.title: Steering input port from steer.js
issues.body:
## Summary
Port BeyWeb steering forces from player input to server-side bey velocity changes.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Steer vector applied each physics tick
- [ ] Steer strength scales with spin gauge
- [ ] Launch grace period blocks steering
- [ ] Matches BeyWeb feel in local test

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/physics/steer.js`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/ServerScriptService/Physics/Steer.lua`
- `src/ReplicatedStorage/Shared/Config.lua`

issues.title: Custom bey-vs-bey clash resolver
issues.body:
## Summary
Port Cannon-es bypass clash math from `contact.js` — manual impulse on XZ plane.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Top-top contacts resolved manually each tick
- [ ] Knockback scales with relative velocity and stats
- [ ] Spin transfer on clash matches BeyWeb
- [ ] No default Roblox collision response used

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/physics/contact.js`
- `js/game/stats.js`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/ServerScriptService/Physics/Contact.lua`
- `src/ReplicatedStorage/Shared/Stats.lua`

issues.title: Arena wall bounce physics
issues.body:
## Summary
Port rim wall reflection from BeyWeb arena geometry with correct angle and damping.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Bey reflects off bowl inner wall
- [ ] Wall bounce damping matches CONFIG
- [ ] No escape through mesh gaps
- [ ] Unit test against known angle in/out

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/physics/arena.js`
- `js/physics/arenaGeometry.js`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/ServerScriptService/Physics/Arena.lua`
- `src/ReplicatedStorage/Shared/Config.lua`

issues.title: Center pull (sonic quicksand base)
issues.body:
## Summary
Implement radial pull toward arena center used by Libra buster and base physics tuning.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Pull force scales with distance from center
- [ ] Disabled during launch grace
- [ ] Tunable via Config module
- [ ] Used by passive arena curve

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/physics/arena.js` (center pull)
- `js/config.js`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/ServerScriptService/Physics/Arena.lua`

issues.title: Wobble and sleep-out detection
issues.body:
## Summary
Port wobble tilt progression and sleep-out win condition when spin hits zero in-bowl.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Wobble visual state triggered below threshold
- [ ] Sleep-out declared when spin = 0 and in bounds
- [ ] Wobble increases tip-over chance near rim
- [ ] State included in snapshot for client anim

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/physics/top.js`
- `js/game/rules.js`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/ServerScriptService/Physics/Spin.lua`
- `src/ReplicatedStorage/Shared/Rules.lua`

issues.title: KO pocket detection port arena.js
issues.body:
## Summary
Detect ring-outs through 3 KO pockets using BeyWeb pocket angle constants.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Three pockets at correct bowl angles
- [ ] Ring-out when bey center crosses pocket threshold
- [ ] KO awards round to opponent
- [ ] Pocket geometry matches BeyWeb epsilon

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/physics/arena.js`
- `js/physics/ringOut.js`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/ServerScriptService/Physics/Arena.lua`
- `src/ServerScriptService/Physics/RingOut.lua`

issues.body:

Implement 3-round series with score tracking and match end screen.

issues.body:

Animate bey drop from launch height into bowl at round start.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Drop from platform height over grace period
- [ ] Landing does not apply clash until grace ends
- [ ] Drop synced from snapshot spawn state
- [ ] Smooth easing on client

## BeyWeb reference

- `js/physics/top.js`

issues.title: Wobble tip-over death animation
issues.body:
## Summary
Animate increasing tilt and tip-over when spin is critically low.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Tilt angle scales inversely with spin
- [ ] Tip-over plays on sleep-out
- [ ] Bey settles flat after tip
- [ ] Driven by snapshot wobble field

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/render/top.js`
- `js/physics/top.js`

## BeyBlox target paths

issues.title: KO ring-out cinematic
issues.body:

Port ring-out fly-out and slow emphasis from BeyWeb `ringOut.js`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Bey arcs out through pocket on KO
- [ ] Brief camera follow on ring-out
- [ ] Round end triggered after anim
- [ ] Client VFX only; server already decided KO

## BeyWeb reference

- `js/render/scene.js`

issues.title: Ability registry pattern
issues.body:

Port BeyWeb ability registry with onActivate, onStep, onEnd, onContact hooks.

## Acceptance criteria

issues.title: Port ability: pegasus_speed_boost
issues.body:
## Summary
Pegasus power move — temporary steer and speed multiplier.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Server logic matches BeyWeb `pegasus_speed_boost` in impl.js

- [ ] Stats recomputation cases
- [ ] KO/SO/draw rule cases
- [ ] Elo delta edge cases
- [ ] CI runs via foreman/lune

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/game/stats.js`
- `js/game/rules.js`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/ReplicatedStorage/Shared/Stats.lua`
- `src/ReplicatedStorage/Shared/Rules.lua`
- `src/ReplicatedStorage/Shared/Elo.lua`
- `tests/`

issues.title: BeyWeb physics parity test harness
issues.body:
## Summary
Replay BeyWeb input logs through Roblox sim and compare outcomes.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Import match seed + inputs
- [ ] Compare final positions within epsilon
- [ ] Passive physics (no abilities) pass first
- [ ] Document in MIGRATION_FROM_BEYWEB.md

## BeyWeb reference
- `server/Room.js` (matchSeed)
- `docs/MIGRATION_FROM_BEYWEB.md`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `tests/parity/`
- `src/ServerScriptService/MatchService.lua`

issues.title: Load test MatchSnapshot throughput
issues.body:
## Summary
Stress-test snapshot broadcast with multiple spectators.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Simulate 10+ clients receiving snapshots
- [ ] Measure server CPU and bandwidth
- [ ] Tune snapshot payload size
- [ ] Document limits

## BeyWeb reference
- `js/net/snapshot.js`

## BeyBlox target paths
- `tests/load/snapshot.lua` (or external script)

issues.title: Seasonal badges and profile flair
issues.body:
## Summary
Award cosmetic badges for seasonal ranked/tournament placement.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Badge ids in profile
- [ ] Displayed on leaderboard and hub nameplate
- [ ] Season rollover archives old badge
- [ ] No pay-to-win stats

## BeyWeb reference
- N/A

## BeyBlox target paths
- `src/ReplicatedStorage/Shared/Progression.lua`
- `src/StarterGui/Profile/Flair`
